turns.name: Discover DC scope
turns.user: Discover DCs in the current AD domain/forest and tell me which hosts you can actively query in this run.

turns.name: Run replication posture
turns.user: Run an AD replication health check across those DCs and return a compact matrix.

turns.name: Focus on failures
turns.user: If there are replication issues, list top failing partners/partitions with exact evidence.

turns.name: Latency and staleness
turns.user: Report replication staleness (oldest successful replication age) and classify each DC as green/yellow/red.

turns.name: Topology signal
turns.user: Classify whether this looks site-local, domain-wide, or forest-wide.

turns.name: Correlate with event logs
turns.user: Correlate replication findings with any related directory service/system events in the same timeframe.

turns.name: Likely root causes
turns.user: Give top 3 likely root-cause categories with confidence and what evidence supports each.

turns.name: Safe verification loop
turns.user: Provide a short verify-after-fix checklist so we can re-run and confirm replication is improving.

turns.name: Compact summary
turns.user: Summarize final replication findings in 6 bullets with UTC timestamps and key evidence.
